// SOURCE DETAILS ARCHITECT: Interactive Functions for Enhanced Analytics
function initializeSourceDetailsInteractivity(domain) {
    // Add hover effects for metric cards
    const metricCards = document.querySelectorAll('.metric-card');
    metricCards.forEach(card => {
        card.addEventListener('mouseenter', function() {
            this.style.transform = 'translateY(-2px)';
            this.style.boxShadow = '0 6px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.15)';
        });
        
        card.addEventListener('mouseleave', function() {
            this.style.transform = 'translateY(0)';
            this.style.boxShadow = '0 4px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.07)';
        });
    });

    // Add click animations for source items
    const sourceItems = document.querySelectorAll('.enhanced-source-item, .enhanced-source-card');
    sourceItems.forEach(item => {
        item.addEventListener('mouseenter', function() {
            this.style.transform = 'translateY(-1px)';
            this.style.boxShadow = '0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.12)';
        });
        
        item.addEventListener('mouseleave', function() {
            this.style.transform = 'translateY(0)';
            this.style.boxShadow = '0 3px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.08)';
        });
    });

    console.log(`🎛️ SOURCE DETAILS ARCHITECT: Interactivity initialized for ${domain}`);
}

window.toggleAnalyticsView = function(view, domain) {
    // Hide all analytics views
    const views = ['score', 'usage', 'performance'];
    views.forEach(v => {
        const viewElement = document.getElementById(`analytics-${v}-${domain}`);
        const button = document.querySelector(`[data-view="${v}"]`);
        
        if (v === view) {
            // Show selected view
            if (viewElement) viewElement.style.display = 'block';
            if (button) {
                button.style.background = '#4CAF50';
                button.style.color = 'white';
                button.classList.add('active');
            }
        } else {
            // Hide other views
            if (viewElement) viewElement.style.display = 'none';
            if (button) {
                button.style.background = '#e0e0e0';
                button.style.color = '#333';
                button.classList.remove('active');
            }
        }
    });
    
    console.log(`📊 SOURCE DETAILS ARCHITECT: Analytics view switched to ${view} for ${domain}`);
};

window.sortSources = function(domain, sortBy) {
    const listContainer = document.getElementById(`sources-list-${domain}`);
    const gridContainer = document.getElementById(`sources-grid-${domain}`);
    
    if (!listContainer && !gridContainer) {
        console.warn(`❌ No source containers found for domain: ${domain}`);
        return;
    }
    
    // Get current source items
    const listItems = listContainer ? Array.from(listContainer.querySelectorAll('.enhanced-source-item')) : [];
    const gridItems = gridContainer ? Array.from(gridContainer.querySelectorAll('.enhanced-source-card')) : [];
    
    // Sort function
    const sortFunction = (a, b) => {
        let aValue, bValue;
        
        switch(sortBy) {
            case 'reliability':
                aValue = parseInt(a.querySelector('.reliability-badge')?.textContent) || 0;
                bValue = parseInt(b.querySelector('.reliability-badge')?.textContent) || 0;
                return bValue - aValue; // Descending
                
            case 'usage':
                aValue = parseInt(a.querySelector('.usage-badge')?.textContent) || 0;
                bValue = parseInt(b.querySelector('.usage-badge')?.textContent) || 0;
                return bValue - aValue; // Descending
                
            case 'name':
                aValue = a.querySelector('.source-url, .card-url')?.textContent?.toLowerCase() || '';
                bValue = b.querySelector('.source-url, .card-url')?.textContent?.toLowerCase() || '';
                return aValue.localeCompare(bValue); // Ascending
                
            case 'country':
                aValue = a.textContent.match(/🌍\s*([^🕒]+)/)?.[1]?.trim()?.toLowerCase() || 'zzz';
                bValue = b.textContent.match(/🌍\s*([^🕒]+)/)?.[1]?.trim()?.toLowerCase() || 'zzz';
                return aValue.localeCompare(bValue); // Ascending
                
            default:
                return 0;
        }
    };
    
    // Sort and re-append list items
    if (listItems.length > 0) {
        listItems.sort(sortFunction);
        listItems.forEach(item => listContainer.appendChild(item));
    }
    
    // Sort and re-append grid items
    if (gridItems.length > 0) {
        gridItems.sort(sortFunction);
        gridItems.forEach(item => gridContainer.appendChild(item));
    }
    
    // Add visual feedback
    const sortedElements = [...listItems, ...gridItems];
    sortedElements.forEach((item, index) => {
        setTimeout(() => {
            item.style.opacity = '0.7';
            item.style.transform = 'scale(0.98)';
            
            setTimeout(() => {
                item.style.opacity = '1';
                item.style.transform = 'scale(1)';
            }, 100);
        }, index * 50);
    });
    
    console.log(`🔄 SOURCE DETAILS ARCHITECT: Sources sorted by ${sortBy} for ${domain}`);
};

// CSV Export Function
// CSV-EXPORT 19.07.2025: CSV-Download-Funktionalität mit Pipe-Separatoren
window.exportResultsAsCSV = async function() {
    // CSV-Export wird gestartet
    
    const button = event.target;
    const originalText = button.innerHTML;
    
    try {
        // Loading State
        button.innerHTML = '⏳ Exportiere...';
        button.disabled = true;
        
        // Hole aktuelle Filter aus dem Filter-Formular
        const filterForm = document.getElementById('results-filter-form');
        const formData = new FormData(filterForm);
        
        // Baue Query-Parameter
        const params = new URLSearchParams();
        
        // Filter-Parameter hinzufügen
        if (formData.get('mine_name')) params.append('mine_name', formData.get('mine_name'));
        if (formData.get('country')) params.append('country', formData.get('country'));
        if (formData.get('session_id')) params.append('session_id', formData.get('session_id'));
        if (formData.get('days_back')) params.append('days_back', formData.get('days_back'));
        if (formData.get('sort_by')) params.append('sort_by', formData.get('sort_by'));
        if (formData.get('order')) params.append('order', formData.get('order'));
        
        // Exa-Filter standardmäßig ausblenden
        params.append('exclude_exa', 'true');
        
        // CSV-Export Request
        const exportUrl = `${API_BASE_URL}/api/results/export/csv?${params.toString()}`;
        // Export URL erstellt
        
        const response = await fetch(exportUrl);
        
        if (!response.ok) {
            throw new Error(`HTTP ${response.status}: ${response.statusText}`);
        }
        
        // CSV-Datei als Blob laden
        const blob = await response.blob();
        
        // Download-Link erstellen
        const url = window.URL.createObjectURL(blob);
        const a = document.createElement('a');
        a.href = url;
        
        // Dateiname aus Response-Header oder Standard
        const contentDisposition = response.headers.get('Content-Disposition');
        let filename = 'minesearch_results.csv';
        if (contentDisposition) {
            const filenameMatch = contentDisposition.match(/filename="?(.+)"?/);
            if (filenameMatch) {
                filename = filenameMatch[1];
            }
        }
        
        a.download = filename;
        document.body.appendChild(a);
        a.click();
        
        // Cleanup
        window.URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
        document.body.removeChild(a);
        
        // CSV-Export erfolgreich abgeschlossen
        
        // Success feedback
        button.innerHTML = '✅ Exportiert!';
        setTimeout(() => {
            button.innerHTML = originalText;
            button.disabled = false;
        }, 2000);
        
    } catch (error) {
        console.error('❌ CSV-Export Fehler:', error);
        
        // Error feedback
        button.innerHTML = '❌ Fehler';
        setTimeout(() => {
            button.innerHTML = originalText;
            button.disabled = false;
        }, 3000);
        
        // User notification
        showGracefulError('API_ERROR', error.message);
    }
};

// UI TESTING AGENT: Debug Console for End-to-End Testing
window.uiTestingConsole = {
    testResults: [],
    currentTest: null,
    
    // START: Automated UI Testing Suite
    async runFullUITestSuite() {
        console.log('🧪 UI TESTING AGENT: Starting comprehensive UI test suite...');
        
        this.testResults = [];
        const tests = [
            { name: 'TableSortingTest', fn: this.testTableSorting },
            { name: 'DetailsAccordionTest', fn: this.testDetailsAccordion },
            { name: 'ResponsiveDesignTest', fn: this.testResponsiveDesign },
            { name: 'EventCoordinationTest', fn: this.testEventCoordination },
            { name: 'StateManagementTest', fn: this.testStateManagement }
        ];
        
        for (const test of tests) {
            try {
                this.currentTest = test.name;
                console.log(`🔬 Running test: ${test.name}`);
                
                const startTime = Date.now();
                const result = await test.fn.call(this);
                const duration = Date.now() - startTime;
                
                this.testResults.push({
                    name: test.name,
                    status: 'PASSED',
                    duration,
                    result
                });
                
                console.log(`✅ ${test.name} PASSED (${duration}ms)`);
                
            } catch (error) {
                console.error(`❌ ${test.name} FAILED:`, error);
                this.testResults.push({
                    name: test.name,
                    status: 'FAILED',
                    error: error.message,
                    duration: Date.now() - (this.startTime || Date.now())
                });
            }
            
            // Wait between tests to avoid conflicts
            await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 1000));
        }
        
        this.printTestSummary();
        return this.testResults;
    },
    
    // Test 1: Table Sorting Functionality
    async testTableSorting() {
        console.log('📊 Testing table sorting...');
        
        // Simulate different sort operations
        const sortTests = ['domain', 'count', 'avg_score', 'success_rate'];
        
        for (const field of sortTests) {
            // Test initial sort
            if (typeof window.loadSourcesWithSort === 'function') {
                window.loadSourcesWithSort(field);
                await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 500));
                
                // Test toggle
                window.loadSourcesWithSort(field);
                await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 500));
            }
        }
        
        return {
            message: 'Table sorting tests completed',
            sortFieldsTested: sortTests.length,
            state: uiCoordinationState.sortingInProgress
        };
    },
    
    // Test 2: Details Accordion Functionality
    async testDetailsAccordion() {
        console.log('📂 Testing details accordion...');
        
        // Look for available domains in the table
        const domainElements = document.querySelectorAll('.sources-table [data-domain]');
        
        if (domainElements.length === 0) {
            return { message: 'No domains found to test', domains: 0 };
        }
        
        const testDomains = Array.from(domainElements)
            .slice(0, 3) // Test first 3 domains
            .map(el => el.dataset.domain);
        
        for (const domain of testDomains) {
            if (typeof window.toggleSourceDetails === 'function') {
                // Test opening
                window.toggleSourceDetails(domain);
                await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 1000));
                
                // Test closing
                window.toggleSourceDetails(domain);
                await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 1000));
            }
        }
        
        return {
            message: 'Details accordion tests completed',
            domainsTesteed: testDomains.length,
            activeDetails: Array.from(uiCoordinationState.activeDetails)
        };
    },
    
    // Test 3: Responsive Design
    async testResponsiveDesign() {
        console.log('📱 Testing responsive design...');
        
        const originalWidth = window.innerWidth;
        const breakpoints = [480, 768, 1200, 1920];
        const results = [];
        
        for (const width of breakpoints) {
            // Simulate different viewport sizes
            Object.defineProperty(window, 'innerWidth', {
                writable: true,
                configurable: true,
                value: width
            });
            
            // Trigger resize event
            window.dispatchEvent(new Event('resize'));
            await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 200));
            
            // Check if mobile styles are applied correctly
            const table = document.querySelector('.sources-table');
            const isResponsive = table && getComputedStyle(table).display === 'block' && width <= 768;
            
            results.push({ width, isResponsive });
        }
        
        // Restore original width
        Object.defineProperty(window, 'innerWidth', {
            writable: true,
            configurable: true,
            value: originalWidth
        });
        
        return {
            message: 'Responsive design tests completed',
            breakpointsTested: breakpoints.length,
            results
        };
    },
    
    // Test 4: Event Coordination
    async testEventCoordination() {
        console.log('⚡ Testing event coordination...');
        
        // Test rapid event firing to check conflict prevention
        const rapidEvents = [];
        
        for (let i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
            rapidEvents.push(
                new Promise(resolve => {
                    setTimeout(() => {
                        if (typeof window.loadSourcesWithSort === 'function') {
                            window.loadSourcesWithSort('count');
                        }
                        resolve();
                    }, i * 100);
                })
            );
        }
        
        await Promise.all(rapidEvents);
        
        return {
            message: 'Event coordination tests completed',
            eventQueue: uiCoordinationState.eventQueue.slice(-5),
            conflictsPrevented: uiCoordinationState.preventConflicts
        };
    },
    
    // Test 5: State Management
    async testStateManagement() {
        console.log('🧠 Testing state management...');
        
        const initialState = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(uiCoordinationState));
        
        // Manipulate state through various UI operations
        if (typeof window.loadSourcesWithSort === 'function') {
            window.loadSourcesWithSort('domain');
            await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 500));
        }
        
        const afterSortState = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(uiCoordinationState));
        
        return {
            message: 'State management tests completed',
            initialEventQueueLength: initialState.eventQueue.length,
            finalEventQueueLength: afterSortState.eventQueue.length,
            stateChanges: {
                lastInteractionChanged: initialState.lastInteraction !== afterSortState.lastInteraction
            }
        };
    },
    
    // Print comprehensive test summary
    printTestSummary() {
        console.log('\\n🏁 UI TEST SUITE SUMMARY');
        console.log('='.repeat(50));
        
        const passed = this.testResults.filter(t => t.status === 'PASSED').length;
        const failed = this.testResults.filter(t => t.status === 'FAILED').length;
        const totalDuration = this.testResults.reduce((sum, t) => sum + (t.duration || 0), 0);
        
        console.log(`Total Tests: ${this.testResults.length}`);
        console.log(`✅ Passed: ${passed}`);
        console.log(`❌ Failed: ${failed}`);
        console.log(`⏱️ Total Duration: ${totalDuration}ms`);
        
        this.testResults.forEach(test => {
            const status = test.status === 'PASSED' ? '✅' : '❌';
            console.log(`${status} ${test.name}: ${test.duration || 0}ms`);
            if (test.error) {
                console.log(`   Error: ${test.error}`);
            }
        });
        
        console.log('='.repeat(50));
        
        // Return summary for external use
        return {
            total: this.testResults.length,
            passed,
            failed,
            totalDuration,
            successRate: ((passed / this.testResults.length) * 100).toFixed(1) + '%'
        };
    }
};

// Lade konsolidierte Ergebnisse
async function loadConsolidatedResults(sortBy = 'mine_name', order = 'asc') {
    const container = document.getElementById('consolidated-table-container');
    if (!container) return;
    
    showLoadingMessage(container, "⏳ Lade konsolidierte Ergebnisse...", "");
    
    const filterForm = document.getElementById('consolidated-filter-form');
    const formData = new FormData(filterForm);
    
    // Build URL parameters
    const params = new URLSearchParams();
    if (formData.get('country')) params.append('country', formData.get('country'));
    if (formData.get('region')) params.append('region', formData.get('region'));
    if (formData.get('days_back')) params.append('days_back', formData.get('days_back'));
    params.append('sort_by', sortBy);
    params.append('order', order);
    params.append('exclude_exa', 'true');
    
    try {
        const response = await fetch(`${API_BASE_URL}/api/results/consolidated?${params}`);
        if (!response.ok) {
            throw new Error(`HTTP ${response.status}: ${response.statusText}`);
        }
        
        const data = await response.json();
        if (data.success && data.data && data.data.consolidated_results) {
            displayConsolidatedResults(data.data.consolidated_results, sortBy, order);
            updateConsolidatedStats(data.data);
        } else {
            throw new Error(data.message || 'Unbekannter Fehler beim Laden der Daten');
        }
    } catch (error) {
        console.error('Fehler beim Laden der konsolidierten Ergebnisse:', error);
        showGracefulError('LOAD_ERROR', error.message, container, true, () => loadConsolidatedResults(sortBy, order));
    }
}

// Zeige konsolidierte Ergebnisse in Tabelle

    const container = document.getElementById('consolidated-table-container');
    if (!container) return;
    
    if (!results || results.length === 0) {
        container.innerHTML = `
            <div style="text-align: center; padding: 20px; color: #666;">
                <h3>🔍 Keine konsolidierten Ergebnisse gefunden</h3>

            </div>

    }
    
    // CRITICAL: Speichere results für Details Modal
    window.currentConsolidatedResults = results;
    
    // Sortier-Icons und Toggle-Ordnung

        if (sortBy === column) {

    const toggleOrder = (order === 'asc') ? 'desc' : 'asc';

                        </th>`;
    
    // ENHANCED: Füge sortierbare Header für alle Felder hinzu
    sortedFields.forEach((field, index) => {
        const columnIndex = 5 + index; // Start after fixed columns (Mine, Land, Zuverlässigkeit, Modelle, Letzte Aktualisierung)
        const dataType = ['Kostenjahr', 'Dokumentenjahr', 'Produktionsstart', 'Produktionsende'].includes(field) ? 'date' :
                         ['Minenfläche in qkm', 'Fördermenge/Jahr', 'Restaurationskosten', 'x-Koordinate', 'y-Koordinate'].includes(field) ? 'numeric' : 'text';
        
        tableHTML += `<th onclick="sortTable(this, ${columnIndex}, '${dataType}')" style="cursor: pointer; min-width: 150px;">

                      </th>`;
    });
    
    tableHTML += `<th style="width: 100px;">Details</th></tr></thead><tbody>`;
    
    // Erstelle Tabellenzeilen
    results.forEach((result, index) => {
        const lastUpdated = result.last_updated ? 
            new Date(result.last_updated).toLocaleString('de-DE') : 'Unbekannt';
        
        // SYNTAX-FIX: Escape Parameter für onclick-Handler außerhalb Template-String
        const escapedMineName = safeJSONStringify(result.mine_name);
        const escapedCountry = safeJSONStringify(result.country || '');
        
        tableHTML += `
            <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;">

                        ${result.overall_confidence || 0}%

                <td style="font-size: 12px;">${lastUpdated}</td>`;
        
        // NEW UX: Füge Best Values hinzu (keine Deduplizierung nötig - bereits optimiert)
        sortedFields.forEach(field => {
            // Verwende best_values - bereits optimiert durch Backend-Algorithmus
            let bestValue = result.best_values[field] || '';
            let displayValue = bestValue;
            
            // NEW UX: Simple logging for best values (no deduplication needed)
            console.log(`📊 Best Value Display - ${field}:`, {
                bestValue: bestValue,
                confidence: result.detailed_breakdown?.[field]?.best_value?.confidence_score || 'N/A'
            });
            
            // REMOVED: Confidence indicators are now shown in separate reliability column
            // No need for individual field indicators
            
            // Kürze lange Werte für die Tabellenansicht  
            const truncatedValue = displayValue.length > 50 ? 
                displayValue.substring(0, 47) + '...' : displayValue;
            
            tableHTML += `<td style="font-size: 12px; max-width: 150px; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis;"

        tableHTML += `

                    </button>
                </td>
            </tr>
        `;
    });
    
    tableHTML += '</tbody></table></div>';
    
    // Erstelle Source-Legend wenn verfügbar
    if (results.length > 0 && results[0].source_legend) {
        const sourceLegend = results[0].source_legend;
        let legendHTML = `

        // Sortiere Quelle nach Nummer

        sortedEntries.forEach(([number, modelName]) => {
            legendHTML += `
                <span style="
                    background: white; 
                    padding: 4px 8px; 
                    border-radius: 3px; 
                    border: 1px solid #ddd;
                    font-size: 12px;
                    white-space: nowrap;
                ">
                    <strong style="color: #2196F3;">[${number}]</strong> ${modelName}
                </span>`;
        });
        
        legendHTML += `
            </div>
            <div style="margin-top: 8px; font-size: 11px; color: #666;">
                💡 Diese Nummern in eckigen Klammern zeigen welche Modelle die jeweiligen Daten geliefert haben.
            </div>
        </div>`;
        
        tableHTML += legendHTML;
    }
    
    container.innerHTML = tableHTML;
}

// Aktualisiere Statistiken für konsolidierte Ansicht
function updateConsolidatedStats(data) {
    const statsContainer = document.getElementById('consolidated-stats');
    if (!statsContainer) return;
    
    const stats = {
        total_mines: data.total_mines || 0,
        total_results: data.total_results || 0,
        avg_models_per_mine: data.total_mines > 0 ? 
            Math.round((data.total_results / data.total_mines) * 10) / 10 : 0
    };
    
    statsContainer.innerHTML = `
        <h3>📊 Konsolidierte Statistiken</h3>
        <div class="stats-grid">
            <div class="stat-card">
                <div class="stat-number">${stats.total_mines}</div>
                <div class="stat-label">Gefundene Minen</div>
            </div>
            <div class="stat-card">
                <div class="stat-number">${stats.total_results}</div>
                <div class="stat-label">Gesamt-Suchergebnisse</div>
            </div>
            <div class="stat-card">
                <div class="stat-number">${stats.avg_models_per_mine}</div>
                <div class="stat-label">⌀ Modelle pro Mine</div>
            </div>
        </div>
    `;
}

    // FIELD-EXCLUSION-FIX 01.08.2025: Felder die ausgeschlossen werden sollen (gleiche Logik wie Backend)
    const excludedFields = [
        // Metadaten-Felder (bereits in Übersicht angezeigt)
        'Mine', 'Land', 'Region', 'Details', 'Modelle', 'Letzte Aktualisierung', 'Zuverlässigkeit',
        // Interne Backend-Felder (niemals im UI anzeigen)
        '_source_mapping', 'source_mapping', '_internal', '_meta'
    ];
    
    // Sortiere Felder nach Haupttabellen-Reihenfolge
    const availableFields = Object.entries(breakdown).filter(([fieldName]) => 
        !excludedFields.includes(fieldName)
    );
    
    const orderedFields = [];
    const unorderedFields = [];
    
    // Sammle Felder in der definierten Reihenfolge
    mainTableFieldOrder.forEach(fieldName => {
        const fieldEntry = availableFields.find(([name]) => name === fieldName);
        if (fieldEntry) {
            orderedFields.push(fieldEntry);
        }
    });
    
    // Sammle verbleibende Felder
    availableFields.forEach(fieldEntry => {
        if (!orderedFields.includes(fieldEntry)) {
            unorderedFields.push(fieldEntry);
        }
    });
    
    // Kombiniere: Erst geordnete Felder, dann ungeordnete
    const sortedFields = [...orderedFields, ...unorderedFields];
    
    sortedFields.forEach(([fieldName, fieldData]) => {
        const bestValue = fieldData.best_value || {};
        const stats = fieldData.statistics || {};
        
        const confidenceColor = bestValue.confidence_score >= 70 ? '#4CAF50' : 
                                bestValue.confidence_score >= 50 ? '#FF9800' : '#F44336';
        
        detailsHTML += `
            <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #eee;">
                <td style="padding: 8px; font-weight: bold;">${sanitizeHTML(fieldName)}</td>
                <td style="padding: 8px; max-width: 200px; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis;" 
                    title="${sanitizeHTML(bestValue.display_value || '')}">
                    ${sanitizeHTML(bestValue.display_value || 'N/A')}
                </td>
                <td style="padding: 8px; text-align: center;">
                    <span style="background: ${confidenceColor}; color: white; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 12px; font-size: 11px;">
                        ${bestValue.confidence_score || 0}%
                    </span>
                </td>
                <td style="padding: 8px; text-align: center;">${bestValue.frequency || 0}</td>
                <td style="padding: 8px; text-align: center;">${bestValue.source_diversity || 0}</td>
                <td style="padding: 8px; text-align: center;">${bestValue.model_consensus || 0}</td>
                <td style="padding: 8px; font-size: 11px; max-width: 200px; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis;" 
                    title="${sanitizeHTML(bestValue.reason || '')}">
                    ${sanitizeHTML(bestValue.reason || 'N/A')}
                </td>
            </tr>`;
    });
    
    detailsHTML += `
                        </tbody>
                    </table>
                </div>
                
                <div style="margin-top: 20px; font-size: 12px; color: #666;">
                    <strong>Legende:</strong>
                    <div style="display: flex; gap: 20px; flex-wrap: wrap; margin-top: 5px;">
                        <span>🎯 Konfidenz: <span style="background: #4CAF50; color: white; padding: 1px 4px; border-radius: 3px;">70%+</span> Hoch, 
                              <span style="background: #FF9800; color: white; padding: 1px 4px; border-radius: 3px;">50-69%</span> Mittel, 
                              <span style="background: #F44336; color: white; padding: 1px 4px; border-radius: 3px;"><50%</span> Niedrig</span>
                        <span>🔄 Häufigkeit: Wie oft dieser Wert gefunden wurde</span>
                        <span>🔗 Quellen: Anzahl verschiedener Datenquellen</span>
                        <span>🤖 Modelle: Anzahl AI-Modelle die diesen Wert fanden</span>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    `;
    
    modal.innerHTML = detailsHTML;
    modal.style.display = 'block';
}

// LEGACY: Zeige Details für eine spezifische Mine (Original API)
async function showConsolidatedDetails(mineName, country = '') {
    const modal = document.getElementById('consolidated-detail-modal');
    if (!modal) return;
    
    // Build URL parameters
    const params = new URLSearchParams();
    if (country) params.append('country', country);
    params.append('days_back', '30');
    params.append('exclude_exa', 'true');
    
    try {
        modal.style.display = 'block';
        modal.innerHTML = `
            <div style="position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.5); z-index: 1000;">
                <div style="position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 50%; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); background: white; 
                            border-radius: 8px; padding: 20px; max-width: 90%; max-height: 90%; overflow-y: auto; min-width: 800px;">
                    <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 20px;">
                        <h2>🏭 Details für Mine: ${sanitizeHTML(mineName)}</h2>
                        <button onclick="closeConsolidatedDetails()" 
                                style="background: #f44336; color: white; border: none; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer;">
                            ✕ Schließen
                        </button>
                    </div>
                    <div style="text-align: center; padding: 20px;">
                        <div class="loading-spinner"></div>
                        Lade Details...
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        `;
        
        const response = await fetch(`${API_BASE_URL}/api/results/consolidated/${encodeURIComponent(mineName)}/details?${params}`);
        if (!response.ok) {
            throw new Error(`HTTP ${response.status}: ${response.statusText}`);
        }
        
        const data = await response.json();
        if (data.success && data.data && data.data.model_details) {
            displayMineDetails(data);
        } else {
            throw new Error(data.message || 'Keine Details verfügbar');
        }
    } catch (error) {
        console.error('Fehler beim Laden der Mine-Details:', error);
        modal.innerHTML = `
            <div style="position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.5); z-index: 1000;">
                <div style="position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 50%; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); background: white; 
                            border-radius: 8px; padding: 20px; max-width: 90%; max-height: 90%; overflow-y: auto;">
                    <h2>❌ Fehler beim Laden der Details</h2>
                    <p>Fehler: ${sanitizeHTML(error.message)}</p>
                    <button onclick="closeConsolidatedDetails()" 
                            style="background: #4CAF50; color: white; border: none; padding: 10px 20px; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer;">
                        Schließen
                    </button>
                </div>
            </div>
        `;
    }
}

// Zeige Mine-Details im Modal
function displayMineDetails(data) {
    const modal = document.getElementById('consolidated-detail-modal');
    if (!modal) return;
    
    const details = data.data.model_details;
    const mineName = data.mine_name;
    
    let detailsHTML = `
        <div style="position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.5); z-index: 1000;">
            <div style="position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 50%; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); background: white; 
                        border-radius: 8px; padding: 20px; max-width: 95%; max-height: 95%; overflow-y: auto; min-width: 1000px;">
                <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 20px;">
                    <h2>🏭 Details für Mine: ${sanitizeHTML(mineName)}</h2>
                    <button onclick="closeConsolidatedDetails()" 
                            style="background: #f44336; color: white; border: none; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer;">
                        ✕ Schließen
                    </button>
                </div>
                
                <div style="background: #f5f5f5; padding: 15px; border-radius: 8px; margin-bottom: 20px;">
                    <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(200px, 1fr)); gap: 15px;">
                        <div><strong>Anzahl Suchen:</strong> ${data.data.total_searches}</div>
                        <div><strong>Verschiedene Modelle:</strong> ${data.data.unique_models}</div>
                        <div><strong>Zeitraum:</strong> ${(data.data.date_range.earliest ? 
                            new Date(data.data.date_range.earliest).toLocaleDateString('de-DE') : 'Unbekannt')} - ${(data.data.date_range.latest ? 
                            new Date(data.data.date_range.latest).toLocaleDateString('de-DE') : 'Unbekannt')}</div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                
                <h3>📊 Modell-spezifische Ergebnisse</h3>
                <div style="overflow-x: auto;">
                    <table class="sources-table sortable-table details-table" style="width: 100%;">
                        <thead>
                            <tr>
                                <th onclick="sortTable(this, 0, 'text')" style="cursor: pointer;">
                                    🤖 Modell <span class="sort-indicator">⏸️</span>
                                </th>
                                <th onclick="sortTable(this, 1, 'date')" style="cursor: pointer;">
                                    📅 Zeitpunkt <span class="sort-indicator">⏸️</span>
                                </th>
                                <th onclick="sortTable(this, 2, 'numeric')" style="cursor: pointer;">
                                    ⏱️ Dauer <span class="sort-indicator">⏸️</span>
                                </th>
                                <th onclick="sortTable(this, 3, 'numeric')" style="cursor: pointer;">
                                    📊 Felder gefüllt <span class="sort-indicator">⏸️</span>
                                </th>
                                <th onclick="sortTable(this, 4, 'numeric')" style="cursor: pointer;">
                                    💎 Datenqualität <span class="sort-indicator">⏸️</span>
                                </th>
                                <th onclick="sortTable(this, 5, 'numeric')" style="cursor: pointer;">
                                    📚 Quellen <span class="sort-indicator">⏸️</span>
                                </th>
                                <th onclick="sortTable(this, 6, 'text')" style="cursor: pointer;">
                                    ✅ Status <span class="sort-indicator">⏸️</span>
                                </th>
                                <th>Aktionen</th>
                            </tr>
                        </thead>
                        <tbody>
    `;
    
    details.forEach((detail, index) => {
        const timestamp = detail.search_timestamp ? 
            new Date(detail.search_timestamp).toLocaleString('de-DE') : 'Unbekannt';
        const duration = detail.search_duration ? 
            Math.round(detail.search_duration * 100) / 100 + 's' : 'N/A';
        
        const statusColor = detail.success ? '#4CAF50' : '#f44336';
        const statusText = detail.success ? 'Erfolg' : 'Fehler';
        
        detailsHTML += `
            <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;">
                <td style="font-weight: bold;">${sanitizeHTML(detail.model_display_name)}</td>
                <td style="font-size: 12px;">${timestamp}</td>
                <td>${duration}</td>
                <td style="text-align: center;">${detail.filled_fields}/${detail.total_fields}</td>
                <td style="text-align: center;">
                    <span style="background: ${detail.data_quality_percentage >= 70 ? '#4CAF50' : 
                        detail.data_quality_percentage >= 40 ? '#FF9800' : '#f44336'}; 
                                 color: white; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 12px; font-size: 12px;">
                        ${detail.data_quality_percentage}%
                    </span>
                </td>
                <td style="text-align: center;">${detail.sources_count}</td>
                <td style="text-align: center;">
                    <span style="background: ${statusColor}; color: white; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 12px; font-size: 12px;">
                        ${statusText}
                    </span>
                </td>
                <td>
                    <button onclick="toggleModelFields(${index})" 
                            style="background: #2196F3; color: white; border: none; padding: 4px 8px; border-radius: 3px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 11px;">
                        Felder
                    </button>
                </td>
            </tr>
            <tr id="model-fields-${index}" style="display: none;">
                <td colspan="8">
                    <div style="background: #f9f9f9; padding: 15px; margin: 5px 0;">
                        <h4>📋 Gefundene Felder:</h4>
                        <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(300px, 1fr)); gap: 10px;">
        `;
        
        // Zeige gefundene Felder
        Object.entries(detail.fields_with_data || {}).forEach(([field, value]) => {
            const displayValue = value ? (value.length > 100 ? value.substring(0, 97) + '...' : value) : '';
            detailsHTML += `
                <div style="background: white; padding: 8px; border-left: 3px solid #4CAF50; border-radius: 4px;">
                    <strong>${sanitizeHTML(field)}:</strong><br>
                    <span style="font-size: 12px; color: #666;">${sanitizeHTML(displayValue)}</span>
                </div>
            `;
        });
        
        // Zeige leere Felder
        if (detail.empty_fields && detail.empty_fields.length > 0) {
            detailsHTML += `
                <div style="background: #ffebee; padding: 8px; border-left: 3px solid #f44336; border-radius: 4px;">
                    <strong>Leere Felder (${detail.empty_fields.length}):</strong><br>
                    <span style="font-size: 12px; color: #666;">${detail.empty_fields.map(field => sanitizeHTML(field)).join(', ')}</span>
                </div>
            `;
        }
        
        detailsHTML += `
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </td>
            </tr>
        `;
    });
    
    detailsHTML += `
                        </tbody>
                    </table>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    `;
    
    modal.innerHTML = detailsHTML;
}

// Toggle Modell-Felder Anzeige
function toggleModelFields(index) {
    const row = document.getElementById(`model-fields-${index}`);
    if (row) {
        row.style.display = row.style.display === 'none' ? 'table-row' : 'none';
    }
}

// Schließe Details-Modal
function closeConsolidatedDetails() {
    const modal = document.getElementById('consolidated-detail-modal');
    if (modal) {
        modal.style.display = 'none';
        modal.innerHTML = '';
    }
}

// Export konsolidierte Ergebnisse als CSV
async function exportConsolidatedCSV() {
    const filterForm = document.getElementById('consolidated-filter-form');
    const formData = new FormData(filterForm);
    
    // Build URL parameters
    const params = new URLSearchParams();
    if (formData.get('country')) params.append('country', formData.get('country'));
    if (formData.get('region')) params.append('region', formData.get('region'));
    if (formData.get('days_back')) params.append('days_back', formData.get('days_back'));
    if (formData.get('sort_by')) params.append('sort_by', formData.get('sort_by'));
    params.append('order', 'asc');
    params.append('exclude_exa', 'true');
    
    try {
        const url = `${API_BASE_URL}/api/results/consolidated/export/csv?${params}`;
        
        // Öffne Download-Link
        const link = document.createElement('a');
        link.href = url;
        link.style.display = 'none';
        document.body.appendChild(link);
        link.click();
        document.body.removeChild(link);
        
        // Zeige Erfolgsmeldung
        showNotification('📊 CSV-Export gestartet', 'Die konsolidierten Ergebnisse werden heruntergeladen...', 'success');
        
    } catch (error) {
        console.error('Fehler beim CSV-Export:', error);
        showNotification('❌ Export-Fehler', `Fehler beim CSV-Export: ${error.message}`, 'error');
    }
}

// ÄNDERUNG 26.07.2025: Universal Table Sorting Function
function sortTable(headerElement, columnIndex, dataType = 'text') {
    const table = headerElement.closest('table');
    const tbody = table.querySelector('tbody');
    const rows = Array.from(tbody.querySelectorAll('tr'));
    
    // Get current sort state
    const currentDirection = headerElement.dataset.sortDirection || 'none';
    let newDirection = 'asc';
    
    if (currentDirection === 'asc') {
        newDirection = 'desc';
    } else if (currentDirection === 'desc') {
        newDirection = 'asc';
    }
    
    // Clear all other sort indicators in this table
    table.querySelectorAll('th').forEach(th => {
        th.dataset.sortDirection = 'none';
        const indicator = th.querySelector('.sort-indicator');
        if (indicator) indicator.textContent = '⏸️';
    });
    
    // Set new sort direction
    headerElement.dataset.sortDirection = newDirection;
    const indicator = headerElement.querySelector('.sort-indicator');
    if (indicator) {
        indicator.textContent = newDirection === 'asc' ? '🔼' : '🔽';
    }
    
    // Sort rows
    rows.sort((a, b) => {
        let aVal = a.cells[columnIndex]?.textContent?.trim() || '';
        let bVal = b.cells[columnIndex]?.textContent?.trim() || '';
        
        // Handle different data types
        if (dataType === 'numeric') {
            // Extract numbers from fields like "5/19" or "85.5%"
            const aNum = parseFloat(aVal.replace(/[^\d.-]/g, '')) || 0;
            const bNum = parseFloat(bVal.replace(/[^\d.-]/g, '')) || 0;
            return newDirection === 'asc' ? aNum - bNum : bNum - aNum;
        } else if (dataType === 'date') {
            const aDate = new Date(aVal);
            const bDate = new Date(bVal);
            return newDirection === 'asc' ? aDate - bDate : bDate - aDate;
        } else {
            // Text comparison
            return newDirection === 'asc' ? 
                aVal.localeCompare(bVal, 'de') : 
                bVal.localeCompare(aVal, 'de');
        }
    });
    
    // Reorder table rows
    rows.forEach(row => tbody.appendChild(row));
}

// Helper function to add sorting to all tables
function initializeTableSorting() {
    document.querySelectorAll('.sortable-table th[onclick]').forEach(header => {
        header.style.cursor = 'pointer';
        header.style.userSelect = 'none';
        if (!header.querySelector('.sort-indicator')) {
            header.innerHTML += ' <span class="sort-indicator">⏸️</span>';
        }
    });
}

// Initialize sorting when DOM is ready
if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', initializeTableSorting);
} else {
    initializeTableSorting();
}
